title: rosa sepium var. agrestis
intro: Rosa sepium var. agrestis, also known as wild rose or dog rose, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The health benefits of Rosa sepium var. agrestis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
